attacking_style: Thrives on brutal final climbs in summit finishes, capable of matching pure climbers in steep gradients. Shows ability to respond to attacks rather than initiate early moves.
team_tactics: Positioned as primary GC card for EF, relying on team to deliver him into position on climb approaches. Vulnerable when mechanical support fails at critical moments.
terrain_preference: Excels on steep, sustained summit finishes where pure climbing power decides outcomes. Brutal final climbs with high gradients suit his style best.
vulnerability: Mechanical issues at critical GC moments can derail ambitions entirely. Dependent on flawless positioning and equipment through climb approaches.
key_patterns: Performs best on brutal, steep summit finishes requiring sustained climbing power (2 observations)
Shows climbing form renaissance capable of matching top-tier climbers on final ascents (2 observations)
GC ambitions vulnerable to mechanical failures at critical race moments (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: limited recent data with mixed signals - strong climbing form in 2019 but mechanical disruption in 2022 prevents clear assessment
